title: What CRM reports do you use?

posts.author: Evita (Evita)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey, my name is Evita, and I’m currently working on creating a sample dashboard using the eazyBI app. My first focus will be on CRM sales data analysis. It would be really helpful if you could drop a comment about the kind of reports you’d like to create from your CRM data. I’ll make sure to include them in my CRM sample dashboard and share my findings back here shortly.
